title: lepidocordia williamsii
intro: Lepidocordia williamsii, also known as the 'Williams' Cordia', is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family, native to Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Lepidocordia williamsii include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by boiling the leaves in hot water, which is then used to treat various health issues.
